content:
• Assignment Completion Buffs (Perfect submission record = guaranteed minor XP bonus.)
• Faction Bonuses (Each faction’s known buffs apply transparently.)

✔ 🤫 Secret Influences:
• Grade-Based Modifiers (Students who are struggling may secretly receive hidden advantages to help them balance out.)
• Physical Position & Behavior Tracking (Ex: Last student to enter the room = subtle debuff but they don’t know what.)
• Alignment Shifts Based on Participation Style (Players who rarely speak may gain hidden “Watcher” status.)

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Maintains strategic mystery while ensuring fairness.
✔ Prevents students from gaming the system too easily.
✔ Encourages engagement while rewarding subtle observation.

📌 FINAL LOCK-IN QUESTIONS BEFORE EXECUTING VERSION 8.1

1. Fallen Angel Final Decision: Which Version Do We Use?
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 480 (chunk 480/555)
